turns.user_message: I've realized I'm just a nervous person now. It used to not bother me, but today I felt shaky over nothing.
This constant nervous feeling is becoming my normal state. I can't remember the last time I felt truly calm or relaxed inside.
My own thoughts feel like a trap I can't get out of anymore. The background hum of worry has gotten so loud it drowns everything else out.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves. This used to not bother the speaker.
